hero.body: SaathiAI is a WhatsApp-native AI companion that meets every ITI and PMKVY graduate exactly where they are: on their phone, in their language, the moment training ends. No app download. No English barrier. No bureaucracy.

crisis.heading: The numbers make the urgency impossible to ignore.
crisis.stat1Plain: Three out of four trained learners still do not land jobs.
crisis.stat2Plain: Blue-collar churn stays painfully high for employers.
crisis.stat3Label: MSMEs say skilling did not help them hire
crisis.stat3Plain: Trust in formal certificates remains weak.
crisis.stat4Plain: Near-zero feedback means the system stays blind.
crisis.stat5Label: Days some graduates waited for certificates
crisis.stat5Plain: Career momentum can stall for more than three years.

impact.heading: If SaathiAI serves even 10% of India's vocational graduates

cta.heading: Ready to explore the prototype?
cta.body: See all four surfaces: the WhatsApp companion, placement officer dashboard, employer skill card, and district console.

login.signupEmployerOnly: Sign up is currently available for Employers only. Job seekers sign up via WhatsApp.

login.contactNameMin: Contact name must be at least 2 characters

login.signinBody: Sign in to continue your journey
login.signupBody: Register as an employer to post jobs

phone.msg1:
🎓 *Congratulations Ramu ji!* You have completed Electrician (NSQF Level 3).
I am SaathiAI — your career companion. Finding 3 job opportunities for you... 🔍
phone.msg2:
⚡ *Found 3 opportunities for you:*

1. *Electrician Helper* — Varanasi
   ₹12,000/mo · 3.2 km away · NAPS

2. *Wiring Technician* — Sarnath
   ₹14,500/mo · 8.1 km away

3. *Apprentice Electrician* — Mirzapur
   ₹10,000/mo · NSDC verified

Which one are you interested in? Reply with 1, 2, or 3 👇
phone.msg4: ✅ *Perfect choice!* Let's prepare for the interview...

scrolling.galleryCaption: A continuous gallery of Indian vocational workers — electricians, weavers, carpenters, tailors, mechanics, and beauticians — happily engaged in their skilled trades.

breakpoints.subheading: Our research mapped the exact moments the education-to-employment pipeline collapses for India's 15,000 ITIs and PMKVY centres.
breakpoints.card1_body: No placement cell. No guidance. Ramu gets a certificate and walks into a vacuum.
breakpoints.card2_body: Multiple papers, no digital thread. Employers distrust NSQF certificates — burned by bad hires before.
breakpoints.card3_body: Desktop-first, text-heavy, English-centric. No AI nudge, no voice, no Hindi. Ramu can't use it.
breakpoints.card4_body: MSMEs hire via referral. High screening costs. They don't trust formal credentials — they use their own tests.
breakpoints.card5_body: Placement officers use WhatsApp + logbooks. DSSDs have no district-level placement dashboard.

solution.headline: One WhatsApp message. Four surfaces. One unified system.
solution.badge1_headline: Ramu meets his career guide on WhatsApp.
solution.badge1_body: A single activation message at graduation is all it takes. SaathiAI speaks Hindi and Bhojpuri via Sarvam AI. Accepts voice notes. Works on 2G. Intake, match, prepare, place — all in conversation.
solution.miniMockupText:
⚡ *3 matches found for you!*

1. Electrician Helper — Varanasi ₹12k
2. Wiring Tech — Sarnath ₹14.5k
3. Apprentice — Mirzapur ₹10k
solution.badge2_headline: 200 students. One officer. AI does the triage.
solution.badge2_body: SaathiAI surfaces the 12 learners who need human intervention today — and handles the other 188 automatically. Risk scores, auto-reports, employer outreach CRM. Every critical action in ≤2 taps.
solution.badge2_bullet1: AI risk scoring across full cohort
solution.badge3_headline: The certificate MSMEs will actually trust.
solution.badge3_body: SaathiAI translates a generic NSQF Level 3 certificate into a verified, plain-language skill card shared via WhatsApp link. No portal login. No CV. The MSME taps a link, sees a face, a skill claim, a video — and sends a voice note back.
solution.badge4_headline: For the first time, DSSDs can see the truth.
solution.badge4_body: Which trades are placing fastest? Which centres have >60% placement? Where is MSME demand unmet? The district console answers all of this — automatically, weekly.
solution.consoleFooter: 📋 AI Policy Brief auto-generated every Monday

funnel.eyebrow: THE DROPOUT FUNNEL — BEFORE & AFTER SAATHIAI
funnel.headline: From 19% real yield to a system that actually works.
funnel.leftSource: PMKVY data · STRIVE Tracer Study · HR retention surveys

tech.headline: Every API that exists. Finally connected.
tech.sarvam_role: Hindi + 12 Indian language voice. ASR + TTS on 2G.
tech.digilocker_role: NSQF certificate verification via OAuth. Tamper-proof credentials.
tech.sidh_role: 19 central + 74 state schemes. Enrolment, assessment, certification.
tech.ncs_role: Real-time job vacancy data. District-level filtering.
tech.whatsapp_role: Zero-install delivery. Where Ramu already is.

quote.body: "India's vocational system is generating certified, cognitively capable human capital that the market cannot discover, verify, trust, or integrate."
quote.citation: — Structural Bottlenecks in India's Education-to-Employment Pathways, 2026
quote.sources: (Synthesized from World Bank · STRIVE Tracer Study · CAG Audit · India Skills Report 2026)
quote.bottomNote: SaathiAI is the discovery, verification, and trust layer that's missing.

languageShowcase.moreComing: More languages coming soon — Odia, Punjabi, Assamese, and Bhojpuri.
languageShowcase.heading: Your language is our language
languageShowcase.subheading: SaathiAI speaks to every graduate in the language they grew up in — not the language the government uses. Hover a tile to explore.
